title: The Post Office Stamp
synopsis: A quick trip to the post office teaches a child how a letter begins its journey.
sentences: Evan went to the post office with his grandmother on Tuesday morning.
She wanted to send a letter to Evan's cousin in another city.
Inside, people stood in a neat line holding parcels and envelopes.
Evan looked at the bright stamps behind the counter.
His grandmother let him choose one with a picture of a bird.
The clerk weighed the letter and told them how much it would cost.
Then he pressed the stamp onto the corner of the envelope.
Evan asked where the letter would go next.
The clerk explained that it would travel in bags, vans, and sorting rooms before reaching the right house.
Evan dropped the letter into the red post box by the door.
He liked the sound it made when it fell inside.
The letter had started its journey, and Evan felt he had helped send it on its way.
